essence: Designs and manages systems for water supply, flood risk, and sustainable drainage to protect communities and ecosystems.

identity.title: Water Resources Engineer
identity.summary: Develops hydraulic models, designs drainage and flood mitigation, and advises on water management for infrastructure projects.

salary.notes: Specialists in flood risk and large infrastructure projects command higher salaries.

qualifications: Degree in civil or environmental engineering
Experience with hydraulic modelling and SuDS design
Knowledge of water regulations and flood risk assessment
Strong project management and stakeholder skills

lifestyle.description: Office and site balance with modelling, design, and stakeholder engagement; project deadlines and regulatory submissions common.
